/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt CMakeFiles/test-lpr.dir/test-lpr.cpp.o -o test-lpr   -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/lpr  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/lpr:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas -llpr -lrknnrt -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lpthread -lstdc++ /mnt/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so
